Compliance.description: PPRA registered (FFC e.g. 1145553 on agents page); long track record since 1939, no negative regulatory news found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.5/5 (18 reviews, recent 2025 1-star on service/billing); voted #1 service in KZN polls historically (up to 2024). No Google ratings located.

Product Value.description: Full letting services (procure, collect, maintain); transparent but no pricing details; standard industry value.

Innovation.description: Real-time online portal (mobile-friendly); modern website with search/property alerts; no app or advanced tech noted.

Customer Support.description: Dedicated portfolio teams (manager, secretary, bookkeeper); phone/email/form; reviews cite poor response.

Accessibility & Security.description: Online client portal accessible on smart devices 24/7; no app, website modern. No POPIA mentions found, security not detailed. Assumed standard for industry.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Not publicly listed; procurement/admin letting via small fee or % of rental income

socialSentiment.summary: Limited recent X activity; HelloPeter mixed-negative recent; historical service awards.
